allow: Bash(python -c "import json; json.loads\(open\('data/esg_schema.json', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('schema OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); key = os.getenv\('GOOGLE_API_KEY', ''\); print\(f'Key found: {bool\(key\)}'\); print\(f'Key prefix: {key[:10]}...' if key else 'No key'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('extracted_output_v9/Emirates_Telecom_Group_Company_Etisalat_Group_PJSC_2025-03-2/esg_data.json'\)\); ghg=d.get\('environmental',{}\).get\('ghg_emissions',{}\); print\('scope_3:', json.dumps\(ghg.get\('scope_3'\), indent=2\)\); print\('total_emissions:', json.dumps\(ghg.get\('total_emissions'\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\('extracted_output_v9/BURJEEL_HOLDINGS_PLC_2026-03-05/esg_data.json'\); data=json.load\(f\); unmapped=data.get\('vision_unmapped',[]\); print\(f'Total unmapped: {len\(unmapped\)}'\); from collections import Counter; types=Counter\(item.get\('source_type','unknown'\) for item in unmapped\); print\(f'By type: {dict\(types\)}'\); pages=Counter\(item.get\('page','?'\) for item in unmapped\); print\(f'By page: {dict\(sorted\(pages.items\(\)\)\)}'\); numeric=[item for item in unmapped if isinstance\(item.get\('value'\),\(int,float\)\)]; print\(f'Numeric unmapped \({len\(numeric\)}\):'\); [print\(f'  p{item.get\(\\"page\\",\\"?\\"\)} | {item[\\"metric_name\\"]}: {item[\\"value\\"]} {item.get\(\\"unit\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for item in numeric[:40]]")

Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\('extracted_output_v9/BURJEEL_HOLDINGS_PLC_2026-03-05/esg_data.json'\); data=json.load\(f\); unmapped=data.get\('vision_unmapped',[]\); [print\(f'p{item[\\"page\\"]} | {item[\\"metric_name\\"]}: {item[\\"value\\"]} {item.get\(\\"unit\\",\\"\\"\)} \(type: {item.get\(\\"source_type\\",\\"\\"\)}\)'\) for item in unmapped if item.get\('page'\) in [12,13,15]]")

Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\('extracted_output_v10/BURJEEL_HOLDINGS_PLC_2026-03-05/esg_data.json'\); data=json.load\(f\); unmapped=data.get\('vision_unmapped',[]\); [print\(f'p{item[\\"page\\"]} | {item[\\"metric_name\\"]}: {item[\\"value\\"]} {item.get\(\\"unit\\",\\"\\"\)} [{item.get\(\\"source_type\\",\\"\\"\)}]'\) for item in unmapped if item.get\('page'\) in [12,13,15]]")

Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\('extracted_output_v10/BURJEEL_HOLDINGS_PLC_2026-03-05/esg_data.json'\); data=json.load\(f\); unmapped=data.get\('vision_unmapped',[]\); [print\(f'p{item[\\"page\\"]} | {item[\\"metric_name\\"]}: {item[\\"value\\"]} {item.get\(\\"unit\\",\\"\\"\)} [{item.get\(\\"source_type\\",\\"\\"\)}]'\) for item in unmapped if item.get\('page'\) == 15]")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('extracted_output_v10/BURJEEL_HOLDINGS_PLC_2026-03-05/esg_data.json'\)\); env=data.get\('environmental',{}\); print\('=== GHG ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(env.get\('ghg_emissions',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('\\n=== WATER ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(env.get\('water',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('\\n=== ENERGY ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(env.get\('energy',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('extracted_output_v11/BURJEEL_HOLDINGS_PLC_2026-03-05/esg_data.json'\)\); env=data['environmental']; print\('=== GHG ==='\); g=env['ghg_emissions']; print\(f'Scope 1: {g[\\"scope_1\\"][\\"total\\"][\\"value\\"]} \(src: {g[\\"scope_1\\"][\\"total\\"].get\(\\"source\\",\\"text\\"\)}\)'\); print\(f'Scope 2: {g[\\"scope_2\\"][\\"location_based\\"][\\"value\\"]} \(src: {g[\\"scope_2\\"][\\"location_based\\"].get\(\\"source\\",\\"text\\"\)}\)'\); print\(f'Total: {g[\\"total_emissions\\"][\\"value\\"]} \(src: {g[\\"total_emissions\\"].get\(\\"source\\",\\"text\\"\)}\)'\); print\(f'Intensity: {g[\\"emission_intensity\\"][\\"value\\"]} {g[\\"emission_intensity\\"][\\"unit\\"]}'\); print\('\\n=== WATER ==='\); w=env['water']; print\(json.dumps\(w, indent=2\)\); print\('\\n=== WASTE ==='\); wa=env['waste']; print\(json.dumps\(wa, indent=2\)\); print\('\\n=== ENERGY ==='\); e=env['energy']; tc=e.get\('total_consumption',{}\).get\('within_org',{}\); print\(f'Total energy: {tc.get\(\\"value\\",\\"N/A\\"\)} {tc.get\(\\"unit\\",\\"\\"\)} \(src: {tc.get\(\\"source\\",\\"text\\"\)}\)'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\('assests/xbrl_data_pointmapping.json','r'\); data=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); entries=[\(v.get\('xbrl_identifier',''\),k,v.get\('previous Year',False\)\) for k,v in data.items\(\) if v.get\('xbrl_identifier',''\) and v.get\('xbrl_identifier',''\)!='CONCATENATE_RESPONSE']; seen=set\(\); unique=[]; [unique.append\(\(xi,dp,pv\)\) or seen.add\(\(xi,pv\)\) for xi,dp,pv in entries if \(xi,pv\) not in seen]; curr=[u for u in unique if not u[2]]; print\(f'Total unique xbrl_identifiers: {len\(unique\)}'\); print\(f'Current year only: {len\(curr\)}'\); print\(\); [print\(f'{xi}  =>  {dp}'\) for xi,dp,_ in sorted\(curr, key=lambda x: x[0]\)]")
